reasoning: The control requires the separation of publicly accessible components from internal networks. In Kubernetes, this can be achieved by implementing NetworkPolicies to restrict ingress and egress traffic, ensuring that services are not exposed via NodePort, and using TLS for Ingress resources to secure public access. These measures help in logically separating and securing public-facing components from internal networks.
title: 3_13_5: 3.13.5 Implement subnetworks for publicly accessible system components that are physically or logically separated from internal networks
